subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Due to lack of time, a brief reply is being penned to thy letter. The class for the teaching of the Cause hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان از عدم فرصت جواب نامه مختصر مرقوم می گردد مجلس درس تبلیغ نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @non-participation in politics, @justice and mercy, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @being a source of light; guidance
